name: Chicken or Turkey Broccoli Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer broccoli on bottom of greased 9x13" baking dish. Layer chicken or turkey over broccoli.
2. In a saucepan, melt the 6 tbsp butter. Stir in the flour, salt & pepper. Gradually stir in the milk and continue stirring until the white sauce is smooth and comes to a boil. Remove from heat.
3. Combine mayonnaise and lemon juice with white sauce and pour over chicken and broccoli. Sprinkle with cheese.
4. Melt 2 tbsp butter. Stir in bread crumbs and sprinkle over casserole.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
